Bus Timings

Bus 407 Schedule Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque to Al Raha Shopping Centre

August 5, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 407 provides a vital transportation link across Abu Dhabi, connecting various residential, commercial, and educational areas.

Bus Timings

At the Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque departure point, the 407 bus operates throughout the day with departures approximately every 30 minutes during peak hours. Services start early in the morning and continue until late evening, ensuring passengers have frequent and accessible transportation options.

From Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque From Al Raha Shopping Centre

Bus 407 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can refer to the official AD Mobility website, or simply follow this link for 407 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The 407 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque

  2. Abu Dhabi Mall

  3. Collapse

  4. Zayed The First Street

  5. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque

  6. Emirates Tower

  7. Fatimah Bint Mubarak Street

  8. Mariam Bint Said Mosque

  9. Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  10. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street

  11. Al Jazeera Sports Club

  12. Al Maqta Bus Interchange

  13. Abu Dhabi University

  14. Salama Bint Butti School

  15. Municipal Market

  16. Hamza Bin Abdulmotalab Secondary School

  17. Suhaila Rashid Al Rumaithi Mosque

  18. Baniyas Cooperative Society

  1. Taxi Station

  2. Souq

  3. Maryam Bint Omran School

  4. Baniyas Court

  5. Al Asqa’ Street

  6. Magenta Pearl Village 2

  7. Al Oshoush Village

  8. LifeCare Hospital

  9. Al Raha Shopping Centre

Bus 407 Station Overview

Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque

The Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque bus station is an important transit point located near the prominent Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque in Dubai. This station serves the surrounding residential and commercial areas, providing convenient access for visitors and locals attending the mosque or traveling through the neighborhood.

The station is equipped with basic amenities, including seating and information displays, ensuring a comfortable waiting experience. Its proximity to the mosque makes it a key stop for those visiting the area for religious or community activities.

Al Raha Shopping Centre

The Al Raha Shopping Centre bus station is strategically situated near the Al Raha Shopping Centre, a popular retail and leisure destination. This station facilitates easy access to the shopping center and its surrounding commercial zone, catering to both shoppers and local residents.

Its location provides a valuable connection to the shopping and entertainment options available at Al Raha, making it a vital part of the local transit infrastructure.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 407 is affordable, providing a cost-effective means of travel within Abu Dhabi. Exact ticket prices may vary based on the distance traveled, but generally range between AED 3 to AED 5.

Discover the essentials of traveling from Abu Dhabi to Salalah by road with our review of bus times and ticket fares.

Bus Booking

The bus service is designed to accommodate both regular commuters and occasional travelers.

Journey Experience

A journey on Bus 407 from Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque to Al Raha Shopping Centre offers a scenic and leisurely ride through Abu Dhabi. The route takes you through various parts of the city, providing glimpses of both bustling urban life and serene residential areas.

As you travel towards Al Raha Shopping Centre, you pass by key landmarks and vibrant neighborhoods, making it an ideal route for those interested in exploring the city’s dynamic blend of culture and commerce. This route provides a convenient way to experience the city while enjoying the modern conveniences Abu Dhabi has to offer.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily reach Al Raha Shopping Centre, which stands as the farthest point on the 407 bus route originating from Ghurair Al Ojaan Mosque. This route spans a price range of AED 67 to 81, providing commuters with a cost-effective and efficient transportation option in Abu Dhabi.

Bus 407 in Abu Dhabi is a crucial link in the city’s public transport network, providing frequent services that connect key areas throughout the day. With straightforward ticketing and comprehensive route information, Bus 407 ensures reliable and accessible transportation across Abu Dhabi.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 5, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
